title: anthyllis alpestris
intro: Anthyllis alpestris, also known as mountain kidney vetch, is a perennial legume that belongs to the Fabaceae family of plants. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Anthyllis alpestris include reducing inflammation and pain, promoting urinary health, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
